title: scolymocephalus melaleucus
side_effects: Scolymocephalus melaleucus can have side effects if used improperly, such as inducing severe gastrointestinal distress, including diarrhea, nausea, and abdominal pain. In some cases, improper use of the plant may also lead to allergic reactions, which can manifest as skin rashes, itching, and respiratory issues. Prolonged exposure to the plant's toxic compounds can cause liver and kidney damage, potentially resulting in long-term health complications. Furthermore, incorrect consumption of scolymocephalus melaleucus may interact with other medications, leading to adverse reactions and compromised health outcomes.
